title: Rust console_lambda cloud parity + SSE fallback hardening
description:
## Intent
Align `console_lambda` behavior with cloud routing and bounded SSE fallback semantics.

## Scope
- Route/API parity with console client needs
- Deterministic SSE fallback behavior under API Gateway/Lambda constraints
- Error handling and reconnect expectations

## Definition of Done
- Snapshot APIs return expected payloads for tenant routes.
- SSE fallback reconnect behavior is deterministic and documented.
- Unit/integration tests cover route handling and stream behavior.
- No regression to existing local console semantics.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Implemented Lambda cloud parity endpoints and compatibility wiring.
Evidence: `rust/src/bin/console_lambda.rs` now supports `/api/realtime/bootstrap` and `/api/events/realtime`; `cargo test --bin console_lambda` passed (4/4).
Next: frontend task (5.5) should consume `/api/realtime/bootstrap` for MQTT bootstrap.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Added runtime contract documentation for cloud parity and SSE fallback behavior.
Evidence: `docs/CLOUD_CONSOLE_RUNTIME.md` added with endpoint contract, required env vars, and reconnect guidance.
Next: close task as code+tests+docs milestone is complete.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Post-close hardening completed for API Gateway stage-prefix routing, Lambda runtime bootstrap path, and tenant repo-root auto-detection.
Evidence: commit 78a3a3b; cargo test --bin console_lambda (7 passed); authenticated API smoke now returns 200 for /config, /issues, /realtime/bootstrap.
Next: keep closed; consume MQTT bootstrap from frontend validation track (5.5).
Risk/Blocker: none.
